languages.text: "Наследни{mf|к|ца}, вы не вправе повелевать мной. Я — законный владетель Торгового Патента в мере большей, чем вы".
"You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."
languages.original_text: "Наследни{mf|к|ца}, вы не вправе повелевать мной. Я — законный владетель Торгового Патента в мере большей, чем вы".

traits.locale_text: "My heir, you have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine more than it is yours."
"My heir, you have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine more than it is yours."
"My heir, you have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."
"My heir, you have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."
"You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."

languages.text: "Ihr habt nicht die Autorität, mir Befehle zu erteilen. Der Handelsbrief gehört rechtmäßig mir, jedenfalls mehr als Euch."
languages.original_text: "You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt nicht die Autorität, mir Befehle zu erteilen. Der Handelsbrief gehört rechtmäßig mir, jedenfalls mehr als Euch."

languages.text: « Vous n'êtes pas en position de me donner des ordres. La lettre de marque est ma propriété légitime, bien plus que la vôtre. »
languages.original_text: "You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'êtes pas en position de me donner des ordres. La lettre de marque est ma propriété légitime, bien plus que la vôtre. »

languages.text: «No tiene autoridad para darme órdenes. La Patente de Comercio es mía por derecho, más que suya».
languages.original_text: "You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."

traits.locale_text: «No tiene autoridad para darme órdenes. La Patente de Comercio es mía por derecho, más que suya».

languages.text: "Bana emir verme yetkin yok. Ticari Ruhsatname üzerindeki hakkım seninkinden çok. O benimdir."
languages.original_text: "You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."

traits.locale_text: "Bana emir verme yetkin yok. Ticari Ruhsatname üzerindeki hakkım seninkinden çok. O benimdir."

languages.text: “你没资格对我发号施令。我比你更有资格拥有贸易授状。”
languages.original_text: "You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."

traits.locale_text: “你没资格对我发号施令。我比你更有资格拥有贸易授状。”

languages.text: 「お前は私に命令する資格はない。貿易証は正当に私のものだ。お前よりも私のものだ。」
languages.original_text: "You have no authority to give me orders. The Warrant of Trade is rightfully mine, more so than it is yours."

traits.locale_text: 「お前は私に命令する資格はない。貿易証は正当に私のものだ。お前よりも私のものだ。」
